title: claytonia perfoliata
intro: Claytonia perfoliata, also known as miner's lettuce or winter purslane, is a perennial plant that belongs to the purslane family (Portulacaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Claytonia perfoliata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, or added to salads and other dishes as a nutritious and flavorful ingredient.
